---
title: Gaps and Ways Forward in Atmospheric Blocking and Extreme Weather Research
pagetitle: 2026-3-1-Wang2026 - Gang Chen
body-classes: publication-page
format:
  html:
    title-block-style: none
year: 2026
author: Lei Wang, Jian Lu, Melissa L. Breeden, Gang Chen, Stephanie A. Henderson,
  Veeshan Narinesingh, Isla R. Simpson, Tim Woollings, Yanjun Hu and Sandro W. Lubis
venue: Nature Communications
venue_cit: <i>Nature Communications</i>, 17, 2873, doi:10.1038/s41467-026-70487-z.
recommended_citation: 'Lei Wang, Jian Lu, Melissa L. Breeden, Gang Chen, Stephanie
  A. Henderson, Veeshan Narinesingh, Isla R. Simpson, Tim Woollings, Yanjun Hu and
  Sandro W. Lubis, 2026: Gaps and Ways Forward in Atmospheric Blocking and Extreme
  Weather Research, <i>Nature Communications</i>, 17, 2873, doi:10.1038/s41467-026-70487-z.'
paper_url: https://www.nature.com/articles/s41467-026-70487-z
---

::: {.page-with-sidebar}

::: {.sidebar-col}
{{< include /_author-profile.qmd >}}
:::

::: {.content-col}

# Gaps and Ways Forward in Atmospheric Blocking and Extreme Weather Research

*Published in Nature Communications, 2026*

**Recommended citation:** Lei Wang, Jian Lu, Melissa L. Breeden, Gang Chen, Stephanie A. Henderson, Veeshan Narinesingh, Isla R. Simpson, Tim Woollings, Yanjun Hu and Sandro W. Lubis, 2026: Gaps and Ways Forward in Atmospheric Blocking and Extreme Weather Research, <i>Nature Communications</i>, 17, 2873, doi:10.1038/s41467-026-70487-z.

[Download paper](https://www.nature.com/articles/s41467-026-70487-z){target="_blank"}

:::

:::
